definition: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces the concrete byte literal that I2S would retain with a <GAP> placeholder, directly destroying the byte-exact operand required by a single-byte equality gate.

Grimoire's GeneralizationStage re-runs and structural recombination mutators consume execution budget on short, fragmented inputs that never advance the parser far enough to satisfy a content-depth or buffer-fill threshold, while plain cmplog I2S+havoc builds coherent long inputs that reach the condition.
